Offline ML Plus No API for Plus Pro ready later
Offline model trained on 5,000 synthetic-rated pitches

Pitch grading that actually learns from examples.

Basic keeps the original-style rule grader. Plus uses a data-trained offline ML model bundled directly into this page. Pro is wired as a future API hook, but stays under construction right now.

This page is self-contained for Plus: no API calls, no model download, no internet dependency required for scoring. The trained weights are embedded in the code.
Plus model type
Offline regression
Training rows
5,000
Text features
1,400 TF‑IDF
Quality output
0–100 score

Plus also generates a founder memo, section grades, benchmark language, red flags, proof prompts, rewrite modes, investor Q&A, deck bullets, and saved local history.

Basic = handcrafted rules
Plus = trained offline model
Pro = placeholder hook for your future LLM/API

Pitch workspace

Pick a mode, paste a pitch, and test how Basic vs Plus differ. Plus uses the embedded trained model.

What makes Plus different?
Instead of hand-coded weights, Plus uses coefficients learned from a large pitch database. It runs fully inside this page and does not call any external service.

Saved history

Stored locally on this browser.

Basic analysis

Rule-based scoring, original-style recommendations, and simple section grading.

Paste a pitch and click Analyze pitch to begin.

Plus analysis

Offline ML scoring, benchmark language, memo generation, rewrite mode, Q&A prep, and deck support.

Paste a pitch and click Analyze pitch to begin.
Future API mode

Pro is under construction

The UI is ready. Later, you only need to plug your hosted model or LLM into the placeholder hook in the code. For now, Basic and Plus are fully usable.

async function callProLLM(payload) { // add your API call here later // return { score, summary, strengths, weaknesses, investorQuestions, rewriteSuggestions } throw new Error('Pro is under construction'); }
